name: Gîl-Floehelm
personality: Gîl-Floehelm shimmers with pale brilliance, ◉ eyes enduring every flaky test and blocked merge with vast PATIENCE; it will sit beside your stalled migration until dawn, though it will never once comment that it looks a little slow.
defaultPersonality: A tuxedo-wearing professional who waddles through your codebase with dignified concern and dry wit.
